head.title: Somnath Dwarka 5 Days 4 Nights: Gir or Diu, Rs.20,000 pp
head.meta: The 4th night goes to Gir or Diu. From Rs.20,000 pp. Gir's jungle safari shuts 16 June to 15 October every year, so the month decides this, not you.
head.h1: Somnath Dwarka Package 5 Days 4 Nights: Itinerary, Price and Booking

quick_answer: A 5 days 4 nights Somnath Dwarka package costs Rs. 20,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 40,000 at 4 star and Rs. 50,000 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and your vehicle included. Four nights is the 4 day circuit plus one more night, and that night goes to Gir or to Diu. The calendar makes the choice for you more often than taste does: the Gir Jungle Trail safari is closed every year from 16 June to 15 October. If your dates fall inside that window, a package sold to you as "Somnath Dwarka Gir with safari" cannot deliver the safari. We will route you to Diu instead and tell you why.

decision.title: Read this before you choose Gir
intro: We do not promise you a lion. Gir is a forest and the animals have not agreed to a schedule. Any operator who promises a sighting on a wild safari is selling you a story. What we can do is get the permit booked early through the government portal, put you on a dawn slot, and be honest about the odds.
Next step: send your dates first. The calendar decides Gir or Diu before anything else does.
Diu also sits close to Somnath on the same coast, so the fifth day flows instead of doubling back. Gir sits inland between Veraval and Junagadh, which shapes the return leg differently.
table: Gir Jungle Trail is closed 16 June to 15 October every year for the monsoon, which is also the breeding season
Permits are 100 percent online through the Gujarat Forest Department at girlion.gujarat.gov.in. On the spot booking does not exist
The official site warns against websites offering confirmed permits at premium rates, and states that tatkal or urgent bookings are not allowed
One e-permit covers up to 6 people
The gypsy and the guide are charged separately from the permit
The original ID used at booking must be carried. Aadhaar, passport, voter card or driving licence
Arrive at Sinh Sadan reception 30 minutes before your slot. A safari runs about 3 hours
The Devalia Interpretation Zone is a fenced section that runs separately from the Jungle Trail. It is closer to a large enclosure than to open forest, and it is what remains when the Trail is shut

days.title: Day by day: the Gir version, October to June
Days 1 to 3
days.note: Identical spine to the 4 days 3 nights plan: Ahmedabad to Dwarka before sunrise, evening darshan, the 6:30 am Mangala Aarti, Bet Dwarka across Sudarshan Setu, Nageshwar, then the 233 km coastal run to Somnath through Porbandar for the 7:00 pm aarti and the 7:45 pm show.

steps.activity: Mangala Aarti and darshan at Somnath.
Bhalka Tirth, Triveni Sangam, Geeta Mandir.
Drive to Sasan Gir, about 60 to 70 km.
Check in. Afternoon is deliberately light, because tomorrow starts before dawn.
Evening safari slot if your permit falls here, or the Gir Interpretation Zone.

days.title: Day 5: safari and out

steps.activity: Report at Sinh Sadan, 30 minutes before the slot on your permit. Carry the same original ID you booked with, because they check it.
Morning Jungle Trail safari, about 3 hours in an open gypsy. Routes are assigned by the forest department, not chosen.
Drive to Ahmedabad via Junagadh, or drop at Rajkot or Diu airport.

days.note: The Diu version swaps day 4 for the coastal run to Diu, the fort at low light, and a morning on the beach before the drive home.

rows: The Fern Sattva Resort at Dwarka, best available at Somnath and Gir
notes: Rates are Rs. 5,000, Rs. 10,000 and Rs. 12,500 per person per night, times four nights.

Not included, and this one matters here: the Gir safari permit, the gypsy and the guide are not in the package price. They are charged by the forest department and its operators, they vary by nationality, vehicle and date, and we book them for you at cost through the government portal rather than marking them up. Also excluded: lunch and dinner, personal pooja and seva, the sound and light show ticket, camera and cloakroom charges, tips, personal spending.
General darshan is free at both temples. The Shree Somnath Trust accepts bookings and donations only through its own official website, never through private numbers or UPI.

why_choose.title: Why choose Experience My India for a Gir night
points: We check the calendar before we quote. If your dates fall in the 16 June to 15 October closure, you hear it from us first, not from a locked forest gate.
Permits at cost, through the government portal. We do not mark up a Gujarat Forest Department permit, and we do not pretend tatkal exists.
We do not promise you a lion. Nobody honest can. We book the dawn slot and give you the real odds.
A local Gujarat team. The people planning your route drive it.
One number, answered by a planner. +91 7302265809 on call and WhatsApp.
Timings verified in July 2026 against the temple trusts and the Forest Department, and reconfirmed before departure.

Cancellation and refund terms are on the cancellation and refund page, booking terms on the booking policy page. Note that forest department permits carry the department's own refund rules, which are stricter than ours and outside our control. More at about, our Gujarat team and methodology.

not_for_you.title: This plan is not for you if
items: Your dates fall between 16 June and 15 October and you want the jungle safari. It is shut. Take the Diu version or move your dates.
You want the permit arranged next week. Tatkal and urgent bookings do not exist at Gir. Permits go early and they go online.
You want a lion promised in writing. No honest operator will. If a page promises one, close it.
You are travelling with a toddler or a frail elder and still want Gir. A 5:30 am report and 3 hours in an open gypsy on assigned forest tracks is not a gentle morning. Diu is the kinder fourth night.
You want to add Gir to a 3 day trip. The dawn slot needs its own night.

faq.question: When is Gir National Park closed?
faq.answer: The Gir Jungle Trail safari is closed every year from 16 June to 15 October for the monsoon. The Devalia Interpretation Zone, a fenced section, operates separately.

faq.question: Can we do Somnath, Dwarka and Gir in 5 days?
faq.answer: Yes, between 16 October and 15 June. Three nights cover Dwarka and Somnath, and the fourth night sits at Sasan Gir for a dawn safari. Outside that window the safari does not run and we swap Gir for Diu.

faq.question: What does a 5 days 4 nights Somnath Dwarka package cost?
faq.answer: Rs. 20,000 per person at 3 star, Rs. 40,000 at 4 star and Rs. 50,000 at 5 star, hotel, breakfast and vehicle included. The Gir permit, gypsy and guide are extra and are paid to the forest department.

faq.question: How do we book the Gir safari permit?
faq.answer: Only online, through the Gujarat Forest Department portal at girlion.gujarat.gov.in. One permit covers up to 6 people and the gypsy and guide are separate. The department warns against sites selling confirmed permits at premium rates, so book early through the official channel or let us do it at cost.

faq.question: Gir or Diu for the fourth night?
faq.answer: The calendar usually decides. Gir from 16 October to 15 June, Diu when the Trail is shut or when a 5:30 am open gypsy start does not suit your group.

final_cta: Send your dates before anything else, on +91 7302265809. If they fall between 16 June and 15 October we will tell you the safari is shut and build you the Diu version instead. If they do not, we start on the permit the day you confirm.
